GiftAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse

GiftAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Gift transaction total Amount
GiftAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Gift transaction total amount.
GiftCardIndicator - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Gift card indicator indicates whether AMEX transactions contain a gift card purchase.
GiftCardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The Gift card type.
GiftCardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
The gift card type.
GiftCardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The gift card type.
GiftCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Gift transaction total counts
GiftCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Gift transaction total counts
GiftCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Gift transaction total counts.
GiftTenderType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The tender type of the account used to activate or reload the gift card.
GiftTipAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Gift transaction tip amount
GiftTipAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Gift transaction tip amount
GiftTipCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Gift transaction tip counts
GiftTipCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.MerchantTotals
Gift transaction tip counts
GiftTotalTaxAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TotalTax
Total tax amount applied to Gift transactions.
GlobalUid - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
An unique ID for each transaction.
GlobalUid - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.HostGateWay
An unique ID for each transaction.
GoogleSmartTap() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
 
GoogleSmartTapCap - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
Bitmaps for the various capabilities that the ECR supports.
Please see Google Smart Tap Capabilities Bitmap Definition
Default value is “00000000000000000000000000000000”
GoogleSmartTapCap - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService
Bitmaps for the various capabilities that the ECR supports.
Please see Google Smart Tap Capabilities Bitmap Definition
Default value is “00000000000000000000000000000000”
GoogleSmartTapData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Google Smart Tap specific data.
Only valid when TransType = VASSETMERCHANTPARAMETERS.
Please refer to ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapfor detail
GoogleSmartTapPushService() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService
 
GoogleSmartTapPushServiceData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
F VAS Push Data.
Only valid when TransType = VASPUSHDATA.
Please refer to ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService for detail.
GuestNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.Restaurant
The guest number.
